title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: A comprehensive AI news video covering dozens of new and updated AI tools and models released recently. Topics span image processing (OmniShotCut, Vista 4D), motion capture (Mocap Anything v2), language models (Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5, SenseNova U1, Nemotron 3, Talkie), agentic systems (recursive multi-agents, Moonlake), and specialized applications (robot control, 3D reconstruction).
